opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "runs inside your OS" claim needs unpacking on the security model. If the agent operates as a privileged daemon, you're essentially trading traditional sandbox isolation for agent capability—this creates lateral movement risks that are harder to audit than user-space tool calls.
actions.reasoning: I have built AI agents with OS-level tool integration, including system daemon patterns and kernel extension interfaces for secure resource access.
